caption: Per-weapon reach in action. The clip zooms into two simultaneous duels: a spear-vs-spear clash on the left and a sword-vs-sword clash on the right. The spearmen (left) fight across a noticeably wider gap — their longer reach lets them strike the enemy first and hold them at spear's length, so the spear line also bleeds slower. The swordsmen (right) have to pack in close to land a blow.
